name: supplier_balance_classifier
description: Classifier that predicts a supplier balance band directly from account balance.
comment: Included as a direct thresholding classifier where the target band is defined entirely by acctbal, making it a clean sanity-check classification task.
target_expression: CASE WHEN s_acctbal < 0 THEN 0 WHEN s_acctbal < 3000 THEN 1 WHEN s_acctbal < 6000 THEN 2 ELSE 3 END
